description: Production-grade Kubernetes Cluster Monitoring Dashboard for SRE, Platform Engineering, DevOps, and Kubernetes Operations teams. Covers all 14 sections: cluster health, control plane, nodes, workloads, pods, namespaces, capacity planning, persistent storage, networking, ingress, resource efficiency, events, alerts summary, and golden signals. Designed for clusters with 1000+ nodes and 50,000+ pods.

panels.title: ETCD WAL / Backend Commit Latency p99
Resource Requests vs Limits per Namespace
Golden Signal: Latency (API p99 / Ingress p99)
Golden Signal: Saturation (CPU / Memory / Disk / Pod Density)

title: Kubernetes Cluster Monitoring
